comment.body: "around mid week into next week". That is not a narrow window. But the dip is there. Now it is a matter of how deep of a pullback. That is why it is so difficult. So make the trade your own and look for levels and apply good risk mgmt practices. Size and stops are key. Unfortunately the most important part of this phrase (when and at what level the dip is buyable). Is up to us to decide. But on the bright side if you bought puts you printed and that what the most predictable part of the message.
